creator: andrew@ugh.net.au
text:
On Mon, 12 Mar 2001, Mike Heffner wrote:

> Xforms has been downgraded from 0.89 -> 0.88 because .89 is very buggy. Is
> there a specific feature of .89 that is needed?

I was trying to get away without installing the compat3x distribution.
0.89 was built under 4.x apparently. Its not tragic (and infact I have
installed compat3x now) but I thought since I had upgraded the port I may
as well submit it. Some of the changes could be made to the 0.88 port even
without upgrading it...I think it cp's a man page instead of linking it
and it doesn't respect the CC variable etc

Thanks,

Andrew
